title: Raptor (disambiguation)
content:
'''Raptor''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Raptor]]''', a [[captain]] in the [[302nd Battalion]]
*'''[[Shriek-hawk]]''', also known as '''raptors'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Raptor (bounty hunter)|Raptor]]''', a minor [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]
*'''[[Raptor (Trandoshan)|Raptor]]''', a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]]

===Organizations===
*The '''[[Blood Raptors]]''', a [[Genarius]] gang
*The '''[[Raptors]]''', an elite military unit under [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]
*The '''[[Raptors (gang)|Raptors]]''', a [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] gang

===Starships===
*The '''[[Raptor (starship)|''Raptor'']]''', flagship of the [[Stark Commercial Combine]]
*The '''[[Raptor (Star Destroyer)|''Raptor'']]''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] which served under [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]
*The '''[[Raptor (Preybird)|''Raptor'']]''', a [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Preybird-class starfighter|''Preybird''-class starfighter]] used by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] chief [[Mazzic]]
*The '''[[Raptor (Nebulon-B2 frigate)|''Raptor'']]''', a Nebulon-B2 frigate under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]].
*The '''[[Raptor (Black Sun starship)|''Raptor'']]''', a starship used by the criminal organization [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]
*The '''[[TIE/rpt starfighter|TIE Raptor]]'''
*The '''[[Y-4 Transport|Y-4 "Raptor" transport]]'''

===Other===
*'''[[Raptor Run]]''', a [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]] course
*The '''[[Black Raptor]]''', a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]]
*'''[[Raptor-wasp]]s''', a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] insect
*The [[Vectron]] '''[[Raptor (Vectron)|Raptor]]''', a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Raptor
}}
